reasoning: The control AU-11(1) focuses on audit record retention and long-term retrieval capability. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that audit logs have a defined retention policy and are stored in a manner that allows for long-term retrieval. This involves configuring the audit log retention policy and ensuring that audit logs are stored in a persistent and accessible storage solution.
